summary: Frontend + animation testing for premium aluminium showcase site iteration 2. All new animated components verified: page loader, scroll progress bar, hero split text, marquee, animated counters (configuring 25+/1000+/2), services 3D cards, contact form integration. All core flows passing.

issues: Counter targets are correctly set to 25, 1000, 2 in code. Screenshots mid-animation show lower values (expected behavior - counters animate from 0 to target on scroll-into-view).

critical_code_review_comments: All components use framer-motion correctly with useInView triggers
data-testid attributes present on all key interactive elements (contact form inputs, submit button, success state)
ContactSection.jsx properly handles submit, loading state, success state, and error state
AboutSection AnimatedCounter correctly targets 25, 1000, 2 values with suffix support
seed_data_creation: Created one contact submission via UI form test
context_for_next_testing_agent: All sections verified: PageLoader fades after 1.8s, scroll progress bar (gold line) at top, hero split text animation visible, marquee scrolling (PRECISION, DURABILITY, DESIGN EXCELLENCE text), about section with animated counters (25+/1000+/2), 6 service cards with 3D hover, contact form submits to /api/contact and shows Thank You, mobile menu opens/closes correctly, footer with quick links visible. All key data-testid selectors: contact-name-input, contact-email-input, contact-phone-input, contact-message-input, contact-submit-btn, contact-success, contact-send-another, contact-form, hero-section, contact-section.
test_credentials: No auth required - pure showcase site
